request.description:
Creates a new recipe in the database.

Request Body:

- title (String): Name of the recipe
    
- ingredients (String): List of ingredients required
    
- instructions (String): Steps to prepare the recipe
    

Response:

- Returns the created recipe object with unique ID, timestamps, and details.
    

Status Codes:

- 201: Recipe created successfully
    
- 500: Server error

response.name: Create Recipe
response.body:
{
    "title": "Paneer Butter Masala",
    "ingredients": "Paneer, Tomato, Butter, Cream, Spices",
    "instructions": "Cook gravy, add paneer cubes, simmer with cream.",
    "_id": "69cad9aa54aa9a7b5a8484ab",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-30T20:14:34.575Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-30T20:14:34.575Z",
    "__v": 0
}

request.description:
Retrieves all recipes stored in the database.

Response:

- Returns an array of all recipe objects.
    

Status Codes:

- 200: Successfully fetched all recipes
    
- 500: Server error

request.description:
Retrieves a single recipe using its unique ID.

URL Parameter:

- id (String): Unique identifier of the recipe
    

Response:

- Returns the recipe object matching the given ID.
    

Status Codes:

- 200: Recipe found and returned
    
- 500: Server error

response.name: Get recipe by ID
response.body:
{
    "_id": "69cad99b54aa9a7b5a8484a9",
    "title": "Veg Fried Rice",
    "ingredients": "Rice, Vegetables, Soy sauce, Garlic",
    "instructions": "Stir fry vegetables, add rice and sauces, mix well.",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-30T20:14:19.378Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-30T20:14:19.378Z",
    "__v": 0
}

request.description:
Updates an existing recipe by its ID.

URL Parameter:

- id (String): Unique identifier of the recipe
    

Request Body:

- title (String): Updated recipe name
    
- ingredients (String): Updated ingredients
    
- instructions (String): Updated preparation steps
    

Response:

- Returns the updated recipe object.
    

Status Codes:

- 200: Recipe updated successfully
    
- 500: Server error

response.name: Update recipe
response.body:
{
    "_id": "69cad7df54aa9a7b5a8484a5",
    "title": "Chicken Biryani Special",
    "ingredients": "Rice, Chicken, Spices, Onion, Mint",
    "instructions": "Cook with extra spices and garnish with mint.",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-30T20:06:55.289Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-30T20:26:23.089Z",
    "__v": 0
}

request.description:
Deletes a recipe from the database using its ID.

URL Parameter:

- id (String): Unique identifier of the recipe
    

Response:

- Returns a success message confirming deletion.
    

Status Codes:

- 200: Recipe deleted successfully
    
- 500: Server error
